summary: Completed testing of Sistema SAMIDEL checkpoint functionality in Custom Listings. Backend APIs are fully functional, frontend routing issue identified.

integration_issues.issue: Unable to consistently access Custom Listings page at /listings route - session management or routing issue

passed_tests: API /api/custom-views/fields returns dynamic checkpoints (3 checkpoint fields found)

View data retrieval with checkpoint values
Checkpoint fields properly formatted with stage names in brackets

success_percentage.frontend: 60% - Backend integration works, navigation issues present

action_item_for_main_agent: Frontend navigation to Custom Listings page (/listings route) has intermittent access issues. The checkpoint functionality is fully implemented and working in the backend. Consider checking session management, authentication flow, or frontend routing configuration.
